titles.en: Punishment of a person who begs in spite of having rations for three days
Punishment of a person who begs in spite of having rations for three days

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْمَعْزَاءِ عَنْ عَنْبَسَهَ بْنِ مُصْعَبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ سَأَلَ النَّاسَ وَ عِنْدَهُ قُوتُ ثَلَاثَهِ أَیَّامٍ لَقِیَ اللَّهَ تَعَالَی یَوْمَ یَلْقَاهُ وَ لَیْسَ فِی وَجْهِهِ لَحْمٌ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْمَعْزَاءِ عَنْ عَنْبَسَهَ بْنِ مُصْعَبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ سَأَلَ النَّاسَ وَ عِنْدَهُ قُوتُ ثَلَاثَهِ أَیَّامٍ لَقِیَ اللَّهَ تَعَالَی یَوْمَ یَلْقَاهُ وَ لَیْسَ فِی وَجْهِهِ لَحْمٌ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ibn Abi ’Umayr from Abi al-Ma’za from ’Anbasa b. Mus’ab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who begs in spite of having rations for next three days, will not have flesh on this face when he meets Allah on the Day of Judgment.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ibn Abi ’Umayr from Abi al-Ma’za from ’Anbasa b. Mus’ab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who begs in spite of having rations for next three days, will not have flesh on this face when he meets Allah on the Day of Judgment.”
